HomeScenario: C-Level / IT Manager

// scenario_mode

Role: C-Level / IT Manager

7 kill chains. Make decisions as the attack unfolds.

The Domain Takeover

A full Active Directory compromise — from initial reconnaissance through Kerberos abuse to domain-wide ransomware deployment.

ldap-reconnaissancepassword-sprayingkerberoastinggolden-ticketdcsynclateral-movementransomware
7 chapters

The Silent Persistence

An attacker gains a foothold with stolen credentials and establishes deep, stealthy persistence mechanisms that survive password resets.

credential-stuffingpass-the-hashadminsdholderdcshadowskeleton-keyssp-attack
6 chapters

The Cloud Bridge

A hybrid attack that pivots from compromised cloud credentials through Entra ID into on-premises infrastructure via federation abuse.

password-attackpass-the-cookieabusing-entra-idgolden-samllateral-movement
5 chapters

The Service Account Heist

Targeting overlooked service accounts — from LDAP enumeration through Kerberos tricks to extracting the entire AD database.

ldap-reconnaissanceas-rep-roastinggmsa-exploitationsilver-ticketservice-account-attacksntds-dit
6 chapters

The Zero-Day Cascade

An unpatched Exchange server becomes the entry point for a cascading attack that ends in domain-wide ransomware.

hafniumpowershell-attacksplaintext-password-extractionpass-the-ticketdcshadowransomware
6 chapters

The Physical Vector

A physical-proximity attack starts with a wireless keyboard exploit and escalates through network-level vulnerabilities to full domain compromise.

mousejackingrainbow-tablezerologongolden-ticketlateral-movement
5 chapters

The AI-Assisted Breach

AI tools are weaponized to craft social engineering attacks, discover injection flaws, and automate lateral movement and malware deployment.

chatgpt-prompt-injectionsql-injectionlateral-movementmalware
4 chapters
// source: netwrix.com/cyber-security-attacks
